```{r}
# 1. 데이터 불러오기
data <- read.csv("CH_crime.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 2. 상위 100개 행 선택
data_100 <- data[1:100, ]

# 3. 새로운 CSV로 저장
write.csv(data_100, "CH_crime_100rows.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)

# 1. 데이터 불러오기
crime <- read.csv("CH_crime_100rows.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 2. 결측 제거
crime <- crime %>%
  filter(!is.na(Latitude), !is.na(Longitude))

# 3. sf point 객체로 변환
crime_sf <- st_as_sf(crime, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)

# 4. zipcode shapefile 불러오기
zip_sf <- st_read("tl_2020_us_zcta520.shp")

# 5. 좌표계 맞추기
zip_sf <- st_transform(zip_sf, st_crs(crime_sf))

# 6. spatial join
crime_joined <- st_join(crime_sf, zip_sf, join = st_within)

# 7. zipcode별 집계
crime_by_zip <- crime_joined %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(ZCTA5CE20) %>%
  summarise(crime_count = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(crime_count))

print(crime_by_zip)
```

```{r}
# 1. 데이터 불러오기
data <- read.csv("CH_crime.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 2. zipcode별 crime 건수 집계
crime_count <- table(data$zipcode)

# 3. 데이터프레임으로 변환
crime_df <- as.data.frame(crime_count)

# 4. 컬럼 이름 정리
colnames(crime_df) <- c("zipcode", "crime_count")

# 5. crime_count 기준 내림차순 정렬
crime_df_sorted <- crime_df[order(-crime_df$crime_count), ]

# 6. 결과 확인
print(crime_df_sorted)
```

```{r}
# 1. 데이터 불러오기
data <- read.csv("CH_crime_zipcode.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 2. crime_rate 계산
data$crime_rate <- data$crime_count / sum(data$crime_count)

# 3. 보기 좋게 10만 명당 crime rate도 계산
#data$crime_rate_per_100000 <- (data$crime_count / data$population) * 100000

# 4. crime_rate 기준 내림차순 정렬
data_sorted <- data[order(-data$crime_rate), ]

# 5. 상위 25% 기준값 구하기
cutoff <- quantile(data_sorted$crime_rate, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)

# 6. 상위 25% zipcode 추출
top_25_zipcodes <- data_sorted[data_sorted$crime_rate >= cutoff, ]

# 7. 결과 확인
print(top_25_zipcodes)

# 8. 저장
write.csv(top_25_zipcodes, "top_25_percent_zipcodes_by_crime_rate.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
